name: mengine
description: MEngine — cross-platform game engine (Rust core + TypeScript)

scripts.codegen: cargo run -p mengine-idl -- --idl-dir idl --out-rust crates/mengine-core/src/generated --out-ts packages/api/src/generated
scripts.sample:cube: npm.cmd run build:samples && cargo run -p mengine-runtime -- --sample spinning-cube
